message:
fix(fcp-cbor): use actual serialized size for throughput metrics

Compute the actual serialized byte count for serialize_medium and
serialize_large benchmarks instead of using hardcoded estimates.
This provides accurate throughput metrics (bytes/sec) that match
the approach used in the deserialization benchmarks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
